name: Graphify (code/doc KG skill for coding agents)
context_primitives: CLI/skill builds a knowledge graph from repo code (AST) + docs/PDFs/images; query/path/god-node discovery; exports graph.html, graph.json, GRAPH_REPORT.md, optional Obsidian vault (--obsidian). Targets token reduction vs reading entire codebase into context.
deployment_pattern: One-time graphify on repo; agent uses graphify query in Cursor/Codex/Claude Code; optional Obsidian export for human + Karpathy-style browsing.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: Project claims large token reduction vs raw file reads; reproduce on this repo before relying on numbers.
ecosystem_integrations: Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode per graphify.net; Neo4j/GraphML export.
differentiators: vs Alex middle-store: precomputed **structure** for code, not conversational middle truncation; vs Copilot index: explicit graph queries and reports.
significance_for_builders: Optional **build-time index** for Context Manager codebase + research folders; does not replace session context policy.
